discriminator_interpretation.interpretation: accuracy = 0.000 on binary domain task means discriminator predicts opposite of true label perfectly; this implies the encoder retains platform-discriminative features (the inversion is consistent with GRL training dynamics). Platform invariance is NOT established by this metric.
